remember: Students will be able to recall the different types of tests used in physical education, such as norm-referenced and criterion-referenced tests.
Students will be able to list the various methods of measurement used in physical education, including anthropometric and physiological measurements.
Students will be able to define the concept of evaluation and its importance in physical education.
understand: Students will be able to understand the difference between test and measurement, and how they are related to evaluation in physical education.
Students will be able to explain the importance of reliability and validity in tests and measurements.
Students will be able to describe the various tools and techniques used in measurement and evaluation in physical education.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of test, measurement, and evaluation in physical education to real-life situations.
Students will be able to design a test or measurement instrument to assess physical fitness or athletic performance.
Students will be able to analyze data collected from tests and measurements to make informed decisions in physical education.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and limitations of different tests and measurements used in physical education.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a test or measurement instrument in assessing physical fitness or athletic performance.
Students will be able to identify the factors that affect the reliability and validity of tests and measurements in physical education.

ncert_objectives: Understand the concept of test, measurement, and evaluation in physical education.
Explain the different types of tests and measurements used in physical education.
Describe the importance of reliability and validity in tests and measurements.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the students on different types of tests and measurements used in physical education, such as norm-referenced and criterion-referenced tests.
Students are expected to understand the concept of evaluation and its importance in physical education.
CBSE evaluates the students' ability to design a test or measurement instrument to assess physical fitness or athletic performance.
